name: Punchers
author: Poki
description: Punchers is a 3D boxing simulator where you can fulfill your fantasy of pursuing a career in boxing. The immersive and realistic graphics will give you the feeling of fighting in the ring yourself. There is even a slow-motion mode where you can feel the fight from a cinematic perspective. Right hook, left hook! You’re already hooked on Punchers, aren’t you? How to play: Lean Direction - WASD or Arrow Keys Left Fist - R or < Right Fist - T or > About the creator: Punchers is created by Vardan Aleksanyan. Check out their other games Lampada Street and Striker Dummies on Poki!
